column1: Tornadoes can pick up objects as____________as automobiles. (HEAVY)
Is the elephant the____________animal in the world? (HEAVY)
Our hearts grow with us. They get___________as we do. (BIG)
This fish today is not as__________as the fish we had last week. (GOOD)
This fish is much____________than the fish we had last week. (GOOD)
The Antarctic is the____________and the____________region of the world. (COLD/WINDY)
Anton has pen friends in seven different__________ . (COUNTRY)
